action.reasoning: Observation: local test of current heuristic (iter 21) yields 0% success across all maps, despite greedy utility + BFS logic. Analysis: run_episode likely has bug where current node index is not updated each step, causing planner to select invalid paths or get stuck. Also tabu list may block necessary moves. Decision: rewrite predict.py with clean run_episode: properly track curr_idx after each step using get_closest_node_idx, maintain short tabu queue (maxlen=3) to prevent immediate reversal but allow necessary re-visits, and use robust select_action (greedy neighbor utility >0, epsilon-random, BFS to global max utility, fallback). Test on 15 maps to verify success rate recovers above 0, then submit eval to regain ~0.55 exploration_score. If test fails, add debug prints.
